title: hieracium pellitum subsp. pseudolanatum
intro: Hieracium pellitum subsp. pseudolanatum, also known as a lesser hawk's beard, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which can be beneficial for treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other renal issues. The health benefits of Hieracium pellitum subsp. pseudolanatum include reducing blood pressure, alleviating symptoms of menopause, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of tinctures and infusions, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
